eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LAW ENFORCEMENT WARNING for the following counties or areas: Big Horn, MT; at 08:45 AM ON APR 9, 2026 Effective until 09:45 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
EFFECTIVE TONIGHT (THURSDAY, APRIL 9TH at 11:59 PM)
HPD Dispatch, which has been contracted to 911iNet in Alabama will no longer be providing dispatch services to HPD.  An agreement has been made, and all dispatch services will be handled again by BHC Dispatch. The phone number 406-665-7900 will continue to work for the next couple of months, but will be forwarded to BHC Dispatch (406-665-9780). If you have an emergency, please dial 911. If you don't have an emergency, please dial 665-9780 and an HPD officer will be dispatched within the City Limits.
